---
title: "2026 UCR URS"
description: "PADLAB members presented four posters at the 2026 Undergraduate Research Symposium"
author: "PADLAB"
date: "04/24/2026"
draft: false
---

![](2026-images/URS.png){width="75%" fig-align="center"}

Five PADLAB undergraduate researchers, Anna Medvedeva, Mark Shimizu, Rabyana Iqbal, Abigail Smith, and Nola Perefil, presented their work at the 20th Annual [UCR Undergraduate Research & Creative Activities Symposium](https://engage.ucr.edu/symposium), showcasing their projects and contributions over the academic year.

### Mark Shimizu

![](2026-images/mark-URS.jpeg){width="100%" fig-align="center"}

### Rabyana Iqbal

![](2026-images/rabyana-URS.jpeg){width="100%" fig-align="center"}

### Abigail Smith

![](2026-images/abbie-URS.jpeg){width="100%" fig-align="center"}

### Nola Perefil

![](2026-images/nola-URS.jpeg){width="100%" fig-align="center"}
